plain_weave.title: Plain Weave
plain_weave.visual_signature: checkerlike grid, honest cloth, high stability

basket_weave.title: Basket Weave
basket_weave.visual_signature: chunky checker texture, paired threads, soft blocky surface

rib_weave.title: Rib Weave
rib_weave.logic: one direction dominates by density or grouping

twill.title: Twill
twill.visual_signature: diagonal ribs, flexible cloth, moving line

satin.title: Satin And Sateen
satin.logic: long floats spread to avoid obvious diagonal
satin.visual_signature: smooth sheen, hidden grid, luminous surface

waffle_weave.title: Waffle Weave
waffle_weave.logic: recessed cell blocks with raised edges

leno.title: Leno Weave
leno.visual_signature: open mesh, locked holes, gauze-like stability

overshot.title: Overshot
overshot.logic: supplementary pattern weft over plain ground
overshot.visual_signature: large motifs, float pattern on stable base

summer_winter.title: Summer And Winter
summer_winter.logic: block weave with tied pattern floats
summer_winter.visual_signature: two-sided block pattern, small tie-down texture

brocade.title: Brocade
brocade.visual_signature: raised ornamental pattern, luxe float drama

tartan.title: Tartan
tartan.visual_signature: stripe sequence mirrored in warp and weft

corduroy.title: Corduroy
corduroy.logic: cut pile ribs from floated wefts

velvet.title: Velvet
velvet.logic: pile warp or weft cut into plush surface

ikat.title: Ikat / Kasuri
ikat.visual_signature: blurred feathered motifs made from yarn color

moire.title: Moiré Silk
moire.visual_signature: flowing wave highlights, pressed rib distortion
